project.name: Example Project
project.goal: Deliver a production-ready feature set with persistent state, automated validation, and handoff documentation.

tasks.title: Establish persistent project state files
tasks.description: Create task.json, progress.md, architecture.md, handoff.md, bootstrap.sh, and run-dev.sh so future sessions can restore context.
verification_steps: Confirm all required state files exist in the repository root.
Open each file and verify it contains project-specific content rather than placeholders.
notes: Bootstrap and run scripts verified locally.

tasks.title: Implement first user-visible end-to-end slice
tasks.description: Build the smallest runnable feature slice that proves the core architecture and user flow.
verification_steps: Run the development server or app entrypoint successfully.
Exercise the primary user path with smoke or e2e verification.
Confirm logs and visible behavior match the intended outcome.
notes: Break into smaller tasks if implementation expands beyond one session.
Do not mark passes=true until real verification completes.

tasks.title: Establish automated quality gates
tasks.description: Add or repair lint, typecheck, build, unit, integration, and smoke test entrypoints appropriate for the project.
verification_steps: Execute lint successfully or document blockers with evidence.
Run at least one automated test path successfully.
notes: If the repo lacks these scripts, create them before expanding feature work.

tasks.title: Deliver operator and maintainer documentation
tasks.description: Write README, architecture, runbook, troubleshooting, and handoff content sufficient for a new engineer to continue work.
verification_steps: Follow the documented setup commands on a clean environment or verify each command still matches the repo.
Confirm documentation references real paths, scripts, and outputs.
notes: Documentation must describe the current implementation, not the target ideal state.

tasks.title: Prepare release artifact and release notes
tasks.description: Produce versioned artifacts, release notes, and the minimal commands needed for push, tag, and publish when permissions allow.
verification_steps: Verify artifact startup or installation path.
Generate release notes aligned with actual shipped changes.
notes: If release permissions are unavailable, provide exact manual takeover steps.
